html:
Exclusive to:

This article is incomplete because of the evil sabotage by Maxwell....
Please help to improve the article, or discuss the issue with the community on the talk page according to the talk page etiquette or on our Discord.

The Pith Hat is a craftable Hat Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Dress Tab, requires Cloth, three Vines and six Cork to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. Its primary usage is preventing the fatiguing effects of the fog during Humid Season when the player has items such as a Backpack or Log Suit equipped to the body slot. The Sewing Kit repairs 62.5% of its Durability.

Pith Hats can also be bought for 10 Oincs at The Sow's Ear Hat Shop in the Pig City.

Gallery

  • Wilba wearing a Pith Hat.
  • Wheeler wearing a Pith Hat.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

"pithhat"
“Pithy.”
–Wilson
“Meh. Not my style, but I'll wear it.”
–Willow
“Is hard like Wolfgang head.”
–Wolfgang
“As hard as my existence.”
–Wendy
“CASING FOR MY METAL HULL”
–WX-78
“Historically accurate and functionally imperative.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's tougher than a touque.”
–Woodie
“Protects my most important part.”
–Maxwell
“Armored head protection amazingly suited to jungle exploration.”
–Wagstaff
“A helm. Nöt mine öwn.”
–Wigfrid
“A safari hat!”
–Webber
“A hard hat!”
–Walani
“Orange pith?”
–Warly
“Tougher than me pirate hat.”
–Woodlegs
“PROTECT-ETH MINE BRAINPAN”
–Wilba
“Zoomy Head Thing”
–Wormwood
“A proper adventuring hat.”
–Wheeler
The Pith Hat is a craftable Hat Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Dress Tab, requires Cloth, three Vines and six Cork to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. Its primary usage is preventing the fatiguing effects of the fog during Humid Season when the player has items such as a Backpack or Log Suit equipped to the body slot. The Sewing Kit repairs 62.5% of its Durability.
Pith Hats can also be bought for 10 Oincs at The Sow's Ear Hat Shop in the Pig City.
